name: Scalloped Corn
recipeInstructions:
May use fresh corn or frozen corn.
Cook corn in microwave. If using fresh or frozen corn,
cook with 2 to 3 tablespoons water. Combine corn, milk, egg,
onion powder and cereal crumbs. Place in casserole dish. Bake
in microwave on Medium or Slow cook for 15 to 18 minutes or
until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. You may
wish to turn the casserole dish halfway through cooking.
Serves 4.
